sub_modules.fft_sign_extend: Combinational sign-extension block that widens input complex samples to the internal/output precision.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_rom64: Combinational twiddle-factor generator for POINTS-point FFT roots of unity in signed Q1.15-style fixed-point format.
sub_modules.fft_complex_mult_q15: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier used for applying FFT twiddle factors.
sub_modules.fft_complex_addsub: Combinational complex add/subtract primitive for butterfly arithmetic.
sub_modules.fft_radix2_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 butterfly primitive producing sum and difference complex outputs.
